title: LIP01: Padding inline custom
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-card width="90%" variant="neutral-02-outlined">
    <gds-list>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable padding-inline="m">
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable checked padding-inline="m">
        <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
        <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    </gds-list>
  </gds-card>
</gds-div>
